title: Generated Help, Structured Results, Output Channels, and Accessibility · Inference Brief: Pokedex Ts Generated Help
summary: Help and dispatch drift apart, handlers print directly, object iteration changes display order, errors use color alone, and progress rewrites one terminal line that assistive technology cannot follow. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts generated help increment in accessible deterministic terminal view layer. Learners progres…
objectives: Generate overview and command help from registry metadata with usage, examples, defaults, invalid forms, and close instructions.
Test blank, tabs, known, alias, unknown, prototype-like, missing, extra, oversized, and changed commands without type assertions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
